headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences files for regulatory approval of new cloud infrastructure offering

sentiment.reasoning: Filing for regulatory approval is a necessary and positive step towards commercializing a new offering, indicating progress but not immediate revenue.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
